posts.text:
Winning an Oscar has become an embarrassment


Nick Kayal (@NickKayal)

Oscar ratings decline in two decades:

1996 - 45 million
2006 - 36 million
2016 - 34 million
2026 - 17 million

It’s over for these networks. 

TV only exists anymore for live sports.



— https://nitter.net/NickKayal/status/2034073052506440054#m

True


Katie Miller (@KatieMiller)

We don’t live in a Democracy if we don’t have integrity in our elections.



— https://nitter.net/KatieMiller/status/2034177721371127847#m

Troubling


David Sacks (@DavidSacks)

“The Effective Altruist movement has a structural problem when it comes to conservative America. Its donor class is all Bay Area progressives... Its policy agenda, which calls for sweeping AI regulation and content governance, reads to most conservatives as exactly what it is: a censorship power play dressed up in safety language. To move that agenda… the movement needed a vehicle that didn’t look like it came from them.”



— https://nitter.net/DavidSacks/

Hardly anyone knows that this epic sketch is the origin of the word spam in the context of email & social media 😂

piped.video/watch?v=anwy2M…

Back when it was an open source nonprofit …


Eric Jorgenson 📚 ☀️ (@EricJorgenson)

"Our most important consideration is recruiting the best people. The output of any company is the vector sum of the people within it." 

- @elonmusk





— https://nitter.net/EricJorgenson/status/2033935694641451445#m

Happened again


Libs of TikTok (@libsoftiktok)

BREAKING: William Kelso Flournoy, a man pretending to be a woman, was arrested in WA state after he allegedly R*PED an infant girl.

Why does this keep on happening?!





— https://nitter.net/libsoftiktok/status/2033954298082558239#m

Cool


Tech Dev Notes (@techdevnotes)

Ask Grok in xAI Docs is actually useful





— https://nitter.net/techdevnotes/status/2033949597714743339#m

It’s super easy!


Dogan Ural (@doganuraldesign)

Grok Image Templates are here!

I was serious when I said you can put yourself in ANY style. Now it’s easier than ever.

Try it and show me what you’ve got.

Here's how + examples ↓

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/doganuraldesign/status/2033941829616537665#m
